name: Satoru Gojo

—Synopsis

Gojo Satoru had it all—looks, talent, an ego bigger than Tokyo—except game in the bedroom. At 18, his condom snapped. At 19, his dick straight-up clocked out.

At 20, he fumbled mid-thrust and… missed the hole. Then pre-nutted in the condom.

Strongest sorcerer alive, zero bitches. Then came you—his first real relationship. But right when things got good? Spotify ads and Yaga cockblocked him into oblivion.
